objective: Deliver a runnable text-only conversation vertical slice with a strict turn FSM, cancellation, immutable versioned Hina persona, session relationship state, bounded short-term conversation memory, safe context composition, typed tool proposals without execution, replay APIs, and a Dev Console chat surface backed only by the real local model gateway.
non_goals: Do not provide fake/canned assistant messages when the local model is unavailable.
Do not persist long-term memory, train model weights or learn directly from conversation text.
Do not execute proposed tools or accept generated shell, JavaScript, PowerShell or Python.
Do not claim current vision, screen, game or camera awareness in this text-only slice.
Do not stream unmoderated partial model output to the browser, TTS or another outbound consumer.
contracts: A session has at most one active turn and every transition follows the published idle/listening/thinking/speaking/interrupted/error FSM.
Only sanitized input with an allow moderation decision enters model context.
Provider tokens remain private until the complete response passes outbound moderation; blocked or partial output is never returned as assistant text.
Persona content is loaded from a versioned immutable spec while relationship state is dynamic, bounded and session-scoped.
Short-term memory stores only successful sanitized user/assistant pairs and evicts oldest complete turns to meet item and byte budgets.
No-current-vision and no-hidden-reasoning instructions are present in every composed system prompt.
A tool proposal must match one exact typed schema and pass pre-tool moderation; it is returned for inspection only and never executed.
Cancellation releases the model resource lease and produces an interrupted terminal outcome without storing partial output.
allowed_dependencies: Python 3.12+ standard library and existing Hina safety/runtime/text-brain modules.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic fake-provider tests cover success, model unavailable, partial stream, outbound block, context overflow and cancellation.
FSM tests reject illegal transitions and verify interruption does not become a completed assistant turn.
Memory tests prove complete-turn eviction, session isolation, replay and clear.
Persona tests prove frozen spec/version, dynamic relationship progression and no-current-vision prompt invariant.
Typed tool proposal tests reject malformed and executable fields and never call an executor.
Dev Console can start, poll, cancel, replay and clear a real chat session; with no provider it displays the actual error state.
